title: hemionitis distans
intro: Hemionitis distans, also known as the fern-leaved polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Hemionitis distans can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies for its purported medicinal effects.
